status.failed: Sending failed. Tap to try again.

permission.camera: Allow the app to use the camera to take photos.
permission.cameraDeniedBody: Open your phone Settings, find this app, then turn on the Camera permission.

storage.lowWarning: Storage is getting low. Old photos that have already been sent will be cleaned up.
storage.lowCritical: Storage is nearly full. Every photo that has been sent is being cleaned up now. Photos that haven’t been sent yet are kept.

capture.refusedBody: Photos can’t be taken because storage is nearly full. Free up some space, then try again.

upload.persistentFailure: {count, plural, one {# photo hasn’t reached the server.} other {# photos haven’t reached the server.}}
